subcodes.first_line: O Samandar! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness! I complain not of aught; nay, I cherish whatsoever hath befallen Me and shall befall in the path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمندر علیک بهائی و عنایتی لااشکو من شیء احب ما ورد علی و یرد فی سبیل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
